description: LIFT (Lexicon Interchange FormaT, sillsdev/lift-standard) profile for the CDSL fourth export view. XML entry/sense/relation/etymology/note structure over the neutral model, MW-focused (same scope as the MDF third view). Implements docs/LIFT_EXPORT_MAPPING.md; every lossy adequacy call is surfaced as a <note type="model-loss"> element.

elementRoles.lift: document root; one <entry> per fragment file in this per-case pass (see LIFT_EXPORT_MAPPING.md stress points on merging into one lexicon)
elementRoles.entry: one lexeme record; id = safe case id, order = MW homonym number when present
elementRoles.variant: segmented/sort form carrying a morpheme boundary (MDF \lc analogue); trait variant-type=segmented-citation-form
elementRoles.sense: one sense; order attribute present only on multi-sense entries (inferred numbering, never claimed observed)
elementRoles.grammatical-info: part of speech with gender folded in (MDF \ps analogue)
elementRoles.relation type=cf: cross-reference: q.v. targets and flattened compound components (MDF \cf analogue)
elementRoles.note type=source: bibliography / source citation, hedge kept as literal 'L.' (MDF \bb analogue)
elementRoles.note type=model-loss: a lossy adequacy call made visible (hedge, root, compound, continuation)
elementRoles.note type=meta: per-entry provenance: profile version, scope, review status, entry type, MW source pointer
elementRoles.note type=sense-numbering: declares inferred (prose) sense numbering on multi-sense entries
